text:
## Branch Performance Metrics  
### Customer Metrics  
| Branch | Customers | Active Accounts | Average Balance | Satisfaction |
|--------|-----------|-----------------|------------------|--------------|
| London Canary Wharf | 85 | 142 | £4,521 | 74 |
| Manchester Central | 68 | 108 | £4,195 | 71 |
| Leeds Financial | 55 | 92 | £3,987 | 70 |
| Birmingham Business | 62 | 105 | £4,287 | 69 |
| Bristol South | 51 | 87 | £3,842 | 72 |
| Edinburgh Royal | 48 | 82 | £4,012 | 73 |
| Glasgow Merchant | 42 | 68 | £3,756 | 71 |
| Liverpool Pier | 38 | 61 | £3,521 | 68 |
| Norwich Market | 35 | 58 | £3,214 | 70 |
| Southampton Water | 32 | 52 | £3,087 | 69 |
| Belfast Central | 28 | 45 | £2,954 | 67 |
name: Chunk 20/34

raw_entities.name: London Canary Wharf Branch
raw_entities.description: A FirstUK Bank branch location operating in the Canary Wharf financial district. Performance is tracked against customer volume, active account counts, average balance, and customer satisfaction scores.

relationships.description: The branch tracks its total customer count as a primary performance metric.
The branch monitors the number of actively used customer accounts.
The branch calculates and reports the average account balance held by customers.
The branch tracks customer satisfaction through periodic survey scoring.
